nodes.name: Webhook – ATS New Hire Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives new hire payload from ATS (Greenhouse/Lever/Workday) when a candidate is marked Hired.

nodes.name: Function – Validate & Assign ID
nodes.notes: Validates required fields, assigns a unique onboarding_id, and flags missing fields.

nodes.name: Airtable – Create Onboarding Record
nodes.notes: Creates the master onboarding record in Airtable with status INITIATED.

nodes.name: IF – Missing Fields?
nodes.notes: Routes to Slack alert if required fields are missing, otherwise continues to welcome email.

nodes.name: Slack – Alert HR: Missing Fields
nodes.notes: Sends a Slack alert to the HR onboarding channel listing the missing fields.

parameters.subject: Welcome to the team, {{$json.full_name}}! Your onboarding starts here.
parameters.text:
Hi {{$json.first_name}},

We're so excited to have you joining us on {{$json.start_date}}!

To get your onboarding started, please complete your intake form here:
{{$json.intake_form_url}}

This should only take about 5 minutes. Once submitted, we'll begin preparing everything for your first day.

Your manager {{$json.manager_name}} has also been notified and will be in touch soon.

Welcome aboard!

The HR Team

nodes.name: Gmail – Send Welcome Email
nodes.notes: Sends personalized welcome email to the new hire with intake form link.

messages.content: You are an HR document processing assistant. Extract structured fields from the provided document text and return valid JSON only. No explanation text.

nodes.name: OpenAI – Document Extraction
nodes.notes: Calls GPT-4o to extract structured fields from each uploaded onboarding document.

nodes.name: Function – Parse AI Extraction
nodes.notes: Parses the AI JSON response and sets the needs_manual_review flag.

messages.content: You are an onboarding experience designer. Create personalized first-week onboarding plans in clean Markdown format. Be warm, professional, and specific to the employee's role.

nodes.name: OpenAI – Generate Onboarding Plan
nodes.notes: Calls GPT-4o to generate a personalized first-week onboarding plan for the new hire.

messages.content: You are an HR communications assistant. Write concise, warm, professional manager briefing summaries.

Write a manager briefing for {{$json.manager_name}} about their new hire {{$json.full_name}} ({{$json.job_title}}) starting on {{$json.start_date}}. Include: introduction, 2-3 suggested first-week actions, any pending items: {{$json.pending_items}}. Under 150 words. Plain text.

nodes.name: OpenAI – Generate Manager Summary
nodes.notes: Calls GPT-3.5-turbo to generate a concise manager briefing email.

nodes.name: Airtable – Update Status: Plan Generated
nodes.notes: Updates the onboarding record status and stores the Notion page URL.

nodes.name: Slack – Notify HR: Plan Ready
nodes.notes: Posts a confirmation to the HR Slack channel when the onboarding plan is ready.

nodes.name: Schedule – Day-1 Readiness Check
nodes.notes: Runs every 6 hours to check onboarding readiness for upcoming start dates.

nodes.name: Function – Readiness Check Logic
nodes.notes: Checks all Day-1 readiness criteria within 24 hours of start date.

nodes.name: Slack – Alert: Readiness Blocked
nodes.notes: Sends priority Slack alert when Day-1 readiness checks fail within 24 hours of start.

meta.description: Main AI-powered onboarding automation workflow. Handles new hire intake, document processing, AI plan generation, and Day-1 readiness checks.
meta.author: Dileep Singh
